## Testing

<!-- How did you verify this? Commands run and their results. -->

- [ ] `ruff check agentzero tests scripts tools`
- [ ] `pytest -q`
- [ ] `python tools/encoding_check.py`

## Checklist

- [ ] CI is green (ruff, tests, encoding check)
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, resumes, or local data committed (see `.gitignore`)
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or setup changed (`README.md` / `docs/`)
- [ ] New code has tests (TDD where practical)
- [ ] Scope is focused and the description explains the "why"
